user.title: Set up DJConnect
user.description: Choose whether the DJConnect device is already on WiFi, or provision WiFi credentials over Bluetooth first.

data_description.setup_method: Use Bluetooth only to write WiFi credentials. Pairing happens over WiFi; Spotify playback is handled by Home Assistant.

pair.title: Pair DJConnect device
pair.description: Enter the pairing code shown on the DJConnect device display. The Client API URL is required for iOS/macOS/Raspberry Pi and only needed for ESP devices when automatic discovery is unavailable. Spotify is a trademark of Spotify AB. DJConnect is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Spotify AB.

data_description.pair_code: The 6 digit code or 12 character device suffix shown on the device display.
data_description.device_name: Friendly name for this DJConnect remote.
data_description.client_type: Type of DJConnect client pairing with Home Assistant: ESP32 device, iOS app, macOS app or Raspberry Pi client.
data_description.local_url: Required for iOS/macOS/Raspberry Pi: copy the Client API URL from the DJConnect client under Settings. For ESP devices, usually leave this empty unless automatic discovery does not work.

ble_wifi.title: Provision WiFi over Bluetooth
ble_wifi.description: Select a DJConnect device in setup mode to write WiFi over BLE, or continue to pairing if WiFi was already configured through the captive portal.

data_description.ble_address: Bluetooth address of the DJConnect setup device.
data_description.wifi_ssid: WiFi network name to save on the DJConnect device.
data_description.wifi_password: WiFi password. This is sent only to the BLE WiFi characteristic and is not logged.
data_description.ble_action: Choose one action: write WiFi over Bluetooth, rescan devices or continue directly to pairing.

spotify.title: Connect Spotify
spotify.description: Confirm the external Home Assistant URL Spotify should return to after authorization. Prefer your Nabu Casa HTTPS URL. DJConnect fills in the default Spotify Client ID automatically; use advanced options only if you want to use your own Client ID.

data_description.spotify_client_id: Advanced override for the bundled Spotify Client ID.
data_description.ha_external_url: Prefilled when Home Assistant has an external URL configured. Prefer your Nabu Casa URL.
data_description.spotify_market: Spotify market used for search and playback requests.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.

spotify_oauth.title: Authorize DJConnect with Spotify
spotify_oauth.description: Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser. After approving access, return here to continue setup.

data_description.assist_pipeline_id: Assist pipeline used by DJConnect devices for speech recognition.
data_description.stt_engine: Home Assistant STT entity used for physical PTT speech recognition. Leave empty to use the Assist pipeline STT provider.
data_description.client_type: Type of DJConnect client pairing with Home Assistant: ESP32 device, iOS app, macOS app or Raspberry Pi client.
data_description.tts_engine: Home Assistant TTS entity used for DJ announcements.
data_description.tts_language: Language passed to the TTS engine.
data_description.tts_voice: Voice passed to the TTS engine when supported.
data_description.dj_response_enabled: Create a temporary WAV or MP3 audio URL and send it with the DJ announcement to the DJConnect device.
data_description.dj_response_prompt: Free-form prompt for the text DJConnect speaks on the device after a request.
data_description.spotify_source: Advanced optional override for a playback output/source. Leave empty for dynamic/default playback.
data_description.liked_proxy_playlist_uri: Optional Spotify playlist URI used by DJConnect as the default playlist.
data_description.firmware_channel: Choose stable for normal OTA updates or beta to test prerelease firmware.
data_description.max_audio_bytes: Compatibility limit for older audio uploads.
data_description.allow_ota_on_battery: Allow firmware updates while the device is not USB powered.
data_description.min_battery_for_ota: Minimum battery percentage before OTA is allowed.
data_description.dj_response_ttl_seconds: Number of seconds the temporary WAV download URL remains valid.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.
data_description.options_action: Choose whether to save options, reauthorize Spotify, retry pairing with the current code, or fully re-pair with a new pairing code.

spotify_reauth.title: Reauthorize Spotify
spotify_reauth.description: Home Assistant opens Spotify so DJConnect can be authorized again. After approval you return to Home Assistant.

spotify_reauth_done.title: Spotify OAuth succeeded
spotify_reauth_done.description: DJConnect Spotify OAuth succeeded. The refresh token is stored in Home Assistant. You can close this window; Home Assistant now manages Spotify playback itself.

repair_pairing.title: Re-pair DJConnect
repair_pairing.description: Put the DJConnect device in pairing mode and enter the new pairing code shown on its display. Home Assistant will create a new device token.

data_description.pair_code: The 6 digit code or 12 character device suffix shown on the device display.
data_description.local_url: Required for iOS/macOS/Raspberry Pi: copy the Client API URL from the DJConnect client under Settings. For ESP devices, usually leave this empty unless automatic discovery does not work.

error.missing_pair_code: Enter the pairing code shown on the DJConnect device display.
error.invalid_pair_code: Enter either a 6 digit pairing code or a 12 character hexadecimal device suffix.
error.spotify_client_id_required: Enter the Client ID from your Spotify Developer App.
error.external_url_required: Enter your Home Assistant external URL, for example your Nabu Casa URL.
error.external_url_https_required: Use an HTTPS external URL. The recommended URL is your Nabu Casa URL.
error.external_url_invalid: Enter a complete HTTPS URL, for example https://example.ui.nabu.casa.
error.oauth_setup_failed: Spotify authorization could not be started. Check the Client ID and external URL, then try again.
error.oauth_not_completed: Spotify authorization has not completed yet. Approve access in Spotify and return to Home Assistant.
error.oauth_failed: Spotify authorization failed. Start the Spotify step again and check the redirect URI in your Spotify app.
error.ble_device_required: Select a DJConnect BLE device or enter its Bluetooth address.
error.wifi_ssid_required: Enter the WiFi SSID to provision.
error.ble_wifi_failed: WiFi provisioning over Bluetooth failed. Check the selected device, SSID and password, then try again.
error.repair_pairing_failed: Re-pairing failed. Check that the DJConnect device is reachable and showing a pairing code.

abort.already_configured: This DJConnect device is already configured.

init.title: DJConnect options
init.description: Adjust DJConnect voice, playback, OTA and firmware settings. Spotify is a trademark of Spotify AB. DJConnect is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Spotify AB.

data_description.assist_pipeline_id: Assist pipeline used by DJConnect devices for speech recognition.
data_description.stt_engine: Home Assistant STT entity used for physical PTT speech recognition. Leave empty to use the Assist pipeline STT provider.
data_description.client_type: Type of DJConnect client pairing with Home Assistant: ESP32 device, iOS app, macOS app or Raspberry Pi client.
data_description.local_url: Configured Client API URL. Read-only; use re-pairing to change this URL.
data_description.dj_response_enabled: Create a temporary WAV or MP3 audio URL and send it with the DJ announcement to the DJConnect device.
data_description.firmware_channel: Choose stable for normal OTA updates or beta to test prerelease firmware.
data_description.dj_response_ttl_seconds: Number of seconds the temporary WAV download URL remains valid.
data_description.allow_ota_on_battery: Allow firmware updates while the device is not USB powered.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.
data_description.options_action: Choose whether to save options, reauthorize Spotify, retry pairing with the current code, or fully re-pair with a new pairing code.

repair_pairing.title: Re-pair DJConnect
repair_pairing.description: Put the DJConnect device in pairing mode and enter the new pairing code shown on its display. Home Assistant will create a new device token.

data_description.pair_code: The 6 digit code or 12 character device suffix shown on the device display.
data_description.local_url: Required for iOS/macOS/Raspberry Pi: copy the Client API URL from the DJConnect client under Settings. For ESP devices, usually leave this empty unless automatic discovery does not work.

error.repair_pairing_failed: Re-pairing failed. Check that the DJConnect device is reachable and showing a pairing code.

missing_spotify_oauth_scopes.title: Spotify authorization is missing playlist scope

init.title: Authorize DJConnect with Spotify
init.description: DJConnect needs Spotify permission again. Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser; approve access, then return to Home Assistant.

authorize.title: Authorize DJConnect with Spotify
authorize.description: Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser. Approve access in Spotify, then return to Home Assistant.

oauth_done.title: Finish Spotify authorization
oauth_done.description: If you approved Spotify access, choose Submit to finish the repair. If you closed the Spotify page without approving, choose Fix again to restart authorization.

error.oauth_not_completed: Spotify authorization has not completed yet. Approve access in Spotify, then try finishing again.

abort.entry_not_found: DJConnect configuration could not be found.

init.title: Authorize DJConnect with Spotify
init.description: DJConnect needs Spotify permission to control music for you. Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser; approve access, then return to Home Assistant.

authorize.title: Authorize DJConnect with Spotify
authorize.description: Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser. Approve access in Spotify, then return to Home Assistant.

oauth_done.description: If you approved Spotify access, choose Submit to finish the repair. If you closed the Spotify page without approving, choose Fix again to restart authorization.

error.oauth_not_completed: Spotify authorization has not completed yet. Approve access in Spotify, then try finishing again.

abort.entry_not_found: DJConnect configuration could not be found.

spotify_refresh_token_revoked.title: Spotify authorization expired or was revoked

init.title: Reauthorize DJConnect with Spotify
init.description: DJConnect's Spotify permission expired or was revoked. Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser; approve access again, then return to Home Assistant.

authorize.description: Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser. Approve access in Spotify, then return to Home Assistant.

oauth_done.title: Finish Spotify authorization
oauth_done.description: If you approved Spotify access, choose Submit to finish the repair. If you closed the Spotify page without approving, choose Fix again to restart authorization.

error.oauth_not_completed: Spotify authorization has not completed yet. Approve access in Spotify, then try finishing again.

abort.entry_not_found: DJConnect configuration could not be found.
